headline: Will ARES' Expanding AUM Balance Aid Long-Term Earnings Growth?
summary: Ares Management targets strong long-term earnings growth as rising AUM, fee revenues and acquisitions expand its alternative investment platform.

headline: Private Credit Really Is More Than Loans to Leveraged Buyouts
summary: Investors are worried about loans that private-credit funds have made to fund buyouts., but the funds do a lot more than that.
